Business justification: Entitlements approve specific space use types (retail, office, multifamily, industrial), which is the core of any land use application. The existing land_use_designation plain text column is a denorma']
  zoning_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.zoning_code. Business justification: Entitlements are fundamentally about obtaining approval under or changing a specific zoning code. FAR compliance, density calculations, and conditional use permits all reference the zoning code. zonin']
  affordable_unit_count varchar [note: 'Number of dwelling units designated as affordable housing within the proposed development. Often a condition of approval for bonus FAR or density bonuses under inclusionary zoning requirements.']
  appeal_deadline_date date [note: 'Date by which an appeal of the entitlement decision must be filed with the appropriate appellate body. After this date, the entitlement decision becomes final and vested. Critical for project risk management.']
  appeal_filed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an appeal of the entitlement decision has been filed by a third party or the applicant. A value of True signals that the entitlement is subject to appellate review and the project timeline may be impacted.']
  applicant_contact varchar [note: 'Primary contact information for the entitlement applicant, including name, phone, or email of the responsible representative. Used for correspondence with the regulatory authority.']
  applicant_name varchar [note: 'Name of the legal entity or individual who submitted the entitlement application to the governing jurisdiction. Typically the property owner, developer, or their authorized representative.']
  application_date date [note: 'Date on which the entitlement application was formally submitted to the governing jurisdiction. Marks the start of the regulatory review clock and is used for tracking processing timelines.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the entitlement was formally approved by the governing regulatory authority or planning commission. Null if the entitlement has not yet been approved.']
  as_built_far decimal(10,4) [note: 'The actual FAR of the completed development as measured upon construction completion. Compared against total allowable FAR to confirm final FAR compliance. Populated post-construction.']
  base_far_allowance decimal(10,4) [note: 'The baseline Floor Area Ratio (FAR) permitted by the zoning district without any bonus mechanisms. Represents the ratio of total building floor area to the gross site area as established by the applicable zoning ordinance.']
  bim_model_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or URL pointing to the Building Information Modeling (BIM) model associated with this entitlement. Links the regulatory entitlement record to the design model used for FAR calculations and compliance documentation.']
  bonus_far decimal(10,4) [note: 'Additional FAR allowance earned through bonus mechanisms such as affordable housing inclusion, open space dedication, transit proximity, or public amenity contributions. Added to the base FAR to derive total allowable FAR.']
  bonus_far_mechanism varchar [note: 'The specific incentive mechanism through which bonus FAR was earned (e.g., affordable housing set-aside, open space dedication, transit proximity, public amenity). Determines the conditions and obligations attached to the bonus FAR grant.']
  conditions_of_approval varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the conditions, mitigation measures, or obligations imposed by the regulatory authority as part of the entitlement approval. May include infrastructure dedications, design requirements, operational restrictions, or monitoring obligations.']
  counsel varchar [note: 'Name of the law firm or attorney representing the applicant in the entitlement process. Entitlement counsel manages regulatory submissions, hearing appearances, and conditions negotiations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when this entitlement record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail requirements and data lineage tracking in the Databricks Silver Layer.']
  denial_date date [note: 'Date on which the entitlement application was formally denied by the governing authority. Null if not denied. Used for tracking appeal windows and regulatory timelines.']
  entitlement_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable descriptive name or title for the entitlement (e.g., \'Mixed-Use Conditional Use Permit — Block 42\', \'Height Variance — Tower A\'). Used for display and reporting purposes.']
  entitlement_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known reference number or case number assigned by the governing jurisdiction or planning authority for this entitlement application (e.g., CUP-2024-0042, VAR-2024-0017). Used for cross-referencing with municipal records.']
  entitlement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the entitlement application. Tracks progression from initial draft through submission, regulatory review, planning commission decision, and any appeal or withdrawal. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|approved|denied|appealed|withdrawn — promote to reference product]']
  entitlement_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the entitlement by its regulatory category. Identifies whether the entitlement is a zoning approval, variance, conditional use permit (CUP), environmental impact review, subdivision map, planned unit development (PUD), or design review. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: zoning_approval|variance|conditional_use_permit|environmental_impact_review|subdivision_map|planned_unit_development|design_review — promote to reference product]']
  environmental_review_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the environmental impact review process associated with this entitlement. Tracks progression from initiation through certification, which is typically a prerequisite for entitlement approval.']
  environmental_review_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the environmental review conducted for this entitlement under applicable environmental law (e.g., CEQA, NEPA). Determines the level of environmental analysis required and the associated public review process.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the approved entitlement expires if construction or required actions have not commenced. Entitlements typically carry a vesting period; expiration triggers re-application requirements.']
  far_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the proposed or as-built development is in compliance with the total allowable FAR. Drives regulatory sign-off and Certificate of Occupancy (COO) issuance eligibility.']
  hearing_date date [note: 'Scheduled or actual date of the planning commission or board hearing at which this entitlement application is reviewed and decided. Critical for project scheduling and stakeholder notification.']
  max_building_height_ft decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum permitted building height in feet as established by the applicable zoning ordinance or as approved through the entitlement process. A key development constraint tracked for compliance.']
  max_density_units varchar [note: 'Maximum number of residential dwelling units permitted on the subject parcel under the applicable zoning ordinance or as approved through the entitlement. Applicable to residential and mixed-use developments.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, internal commentary, or supplementary information related to the entitlement that does not fit into structured fields. Used by project managers and entitlement teams for operational notes.']
  proposed_building_height_ft decimal(10,2) [note: 'Proposed building height in feet as submitted in the entitlement application. Must not exceed the maximum permitted height unless a height variance has been approved.']
  proposed_far decimal(10,4) [note: 'The FAR proposed by the development project as submitted in the entitlement application. Calculated as proposed gross floor area divided by gross site area. Must not exceed total allowable FAR for compliance.']
  proposed_gross_floor_area_sqf decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total proposed gross floor area of the development in square feet (SQF) as submitted in the entitlement application. Used to calculate proposed FAR and assess compliance with density limits.']
  proposed_units varchar [note: 'Number of residential dwelling units proposed in the development application. Compared against maximum density units to assess density compliance.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Specific regulatory body or planning commission responsible for adjudicating this entitlement (e.g., \'City Planning Commission\', \'Board of Zoning Appeals\', \'Environmental Review Board\'). May differ from the broader jurisdiction.']
  site_area_sqf decimal(18,2) [note: 'Gross area of the subject development parcel in square feet (SQF). Used as the denominator in FAR calculations and for density limit assessments.']
  total_allowable_far decimal(10,4) [note: 'The maximum permitted FAR for the subject parcel, calculated as the sum of base FAR allowance and any approved bonus FAR. Represents the regulatory ceiling for building density on the site.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when this entitlement record was last modified. Used for incremental data processing, change detection, and audit trail compliance in the Silver Layer lakehouse.']

  Note: 'Tracks all entitlement activities and FAR compliance calculations for a development project — zoning approvals, variances, conditional use permits, environmental impact reviews, and planning commission decisions. Captures entitlement type, jurisdiction, application date, approval date, conditions of approval, and entitlement status. Includes FAR compliance detail: zoning district, base FAR allowance, bonus FAR mechanisms (affordable housing, open space, transit), total allowable FAR, proposed gross floor area, proposed FAR, as-built FAR, and FAR compliance status. Also records density limits, height restrictions, and the governing regulatory authority. Links to the parent dev_project. SSOT for all entitlement and zoning compliance data within the development domain.'
}

  far_compliance_confirmed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the permitted construction has been confirmed to comply with the applicable Floor Area Ratio (FAR) limits for the zoning district. FAR compliance is a prerequisite for permit issuance in most jurisdictions.']
  fee_payment_date date [note: 'Date on which the permit fee was paid to the issuing authority. Null if fee has not yet been paid. Used for CAPEX draw schedule reconciliation and development cost tracking.']
  final_inspection_date date [note: 'Date on which the final inspection by the issuing authority was completed. Null if final inspection has not yet occurred. Prerequisite for Certificate of Occupancy (COO) issuance.']
  inspection_result_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes recorded by the inspector or project manager documenting findings, deficiencies, or conditions identified during the permit inspection. Supports re-inspection planning and compliance remediation.']
  inspection_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the permit inspection process. Tracks progress from scheduling through final pass/fail determination. Drives COO issuance eligibility and construction milestone sequencing.']
  issuance_date date [note: 'Date on which the permit was officially issued by the authority. Marks the start of the authorized construction window and triggers the permit validity period.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the municipality, county, or jurisdiction authority (Authority Having Jurisdiction — AHJ) that issued this permit. Critical for regulatory compliance tracking and inspection coordination.']
  permit_conditions varchar [note: 'Free-text description of any special conditions, restrictions, or requirements imposed by the issuing authority as part of permit approval. May include noise ordinances, work hour restrictions, environmental mitigation measures, or neighbor notification requirements.']
  permit_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the scope of work authorized under this permit as stated by the issuing authority. Captures the specific construction activities, systems, or structures covered.']
  permit_fee_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total fee amount charged by the issuing authority for the permit application and issuance. Denominated in the local currency (USD). Included in project Capital Expenditure (CAPEX) tracking and development cost budgets.']
  permit_fee_paid boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the permit fee has been fully paid to the issuing authority. Unpaid fees may result in permit suspension or revocation. Supports accounts payable reconciliation for development CAPEX.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Externally assigned permit number issued by the governing municipality or jurisdiction authority. This is the official public-facing identifier used in all regulatory correspondence and inspection scheduling.']
  permit_phase varchar [note: 'Development phase during which this permit is applicable. Aligns the permit to the project lifecycle from entitlement through post-occupancy. Supports milestone-based CAPEX draw scheduling and project reporting.']
  permit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the construction permit. Drives compliance tracking, inspection scheduling, and COO issuance eligibility. Valid values: applied, issued, active, expired, revoked, closed.']
  permit_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the construction permit by trade or phase of work. Drives inspection sequencing and COO issuance workflow. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: grading|foundation|structural|mechanical|electrical|plumbing|fire_suppression|demolition|occupancy|site_work — promote to reference product]']
  renewal_date date [note: 'Date on which the permit was last renewed or extended by the issuing authority. Null if the permit has never been renewed. Supports permit lifecycle management and expiration risk monitoring.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Sequential revision number indicating how many times this permit has been amended or revised since original issuance. A value of 0 indicates the original permit. Supports permit version control and change order tracking.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this construction permit record was last modified in the data platform. Used for incremental data pipeline processing, change detection, and audit compliance.']
  work_completion_date date [note: 'Date by which all permitted construction work must be completed per the permit conditions. Used to track construction schedule compliance and trigger final inspection requests.']
  work_start_date date [note: 'Earliest date on which permitted construction work may legally commence per the permit conditions. May differ from the issuance date if the authority imposes a delayed start condition.']

  Note: 'Records all building and construction permits associated with a development project — grading, foundation, structural, MEP, and final occupancy permits. Captures permit number, permit type, issuing authority (municipality/jurisdiction), application date, issuance date, expiration date, inspection status, COO linkage, fee amounts, and permit conditions or restrictions. SSOT for construction permit tracking within the development domain. Critical for regulatory compliance, inspection scheduling, and certificate of occupancy issuance workflow.'
}
